sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: YEAR pages: add scrollbar-gutter:stable to #side-bar so the scrollbar reserves space before appearing, preventing sidebar content from narrowing and breaking year-link lines.

YEAR pages: remove
elements from #bb-pre-events (the sticky header band) to eliminate wasted vertical space from the large year heading.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR pages: progress timer moved to front of indicator string in fixed-width MM:SS format (e.g. '00:01 ... Processing event "001 / 47: …"'); event counter zero-padded to 3 digits.

YEAR pages: sticky header band (#bb-sticky-bar) groups page title, button container, progress indicator, and pre-event content (icon legend, year heading) in a band pinned below #header while scrolling through events.
All pages: #header is now sticky (top:0) so site navigation stays visible on scroll. #side-bar is sticky below the header with overflow scroll for tall sidebars.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items: YEAR pages: group the global toggle and mismatch filter buttons into a shared #bb-btn-container div. Both buttons are rendered immediately when the script starts but remain disabled (greyed out) until all events finish processing.

YEAR pages: add a live processing indicator below the button container showing 'Processing event "N - <title>" / <total> … <elapsed>' with a running timer. After processing the message switches to 'Done — N events processed in m:ss'.
YEAR pages: hide the wikidot-injected 'Jump to most recent show/event' list-pages-box at the top of the page — it is not useful when the script renders its own UI.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fix false-positive section-label mismatch flag on YEAR pages for 'recording' sections: recording sessions on YEAR pages (<blockquote>) always appear as part of 'show' on DETAIL pages, so their section label should never be compared.

Switch section-label comparison from case-insensitive to case-sensitive (except for the implicit 'show'/'show' pairing) so capitalisation differences like 'with Willie Nile' (YEAR) vs 'With Willie Nile' (DETAIL) are correctly flagged on both YEAR and DETAIL pages.
Extend event-name article rewrite in normalizeDetailName to also handle '(De)' in addition to '(The)' and '(Le)'.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add 'Fetch All Gig Pages' button on the brucebase home page (brucebase.wikidot.com/). When pressed, iterates over every year page listed in the 'Gig Pages' navigation block (1949-64, 1965–2026), fetches each one, runs the full consistency-check pipeline (event-name ✅/❌ glyphs and setlist colour-coding), and renders the accumulated results below the button. A companion '⚡ Mismatches Only' filter button hides clean events across all years simultaneously. Extended @include to match the home page URL (/start or empty path). Refactored extractYearPageEvents() to accept a content element parameter so the same function works on both the live YEAR page DOM and injected year content on the home page.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Support the consolidated 1949-64 YEAR page (brucebase.wikidot.com/1949-64). Extended @include regex to match it, added it to the isYearPage check, and added yearPageSlug() so DETAIL pages for events in 1949–1964 correctly fetch 1949-64 instead of a non-existent per-year page.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Fix '⚡ Mismatches Only' filter having no effect: anchors on YEAR pages are inside

elements, not direct children of .bb-section-processed, so the anchor-based splitting loop never fired. Rewrote applyMismatchFilter to treat each .bb-section-processed div as one event block (which it is, since every event is separated by its own

), and to also hide/restore the preceding
and section-toggle button so orphaned separators don't remain visible.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add '⚡ Mismatches Only' filter toggle on YEAR pages (placed after the global toggle, after #page-title). When active, hides all event blocks that have no name mismatch (❌), no setlist discrepancy (year-only/detail-only/char-diff), and no warning symbol (⚠️/❓). Pressing again restores all events.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Render match/mismatch colours on DETAIL pages where songs are in

elements (not

  • ): renderDetailSetlist now collects

    song elements as a fallback when no

  • exist, and inserts year-only entries as

    nodes to match the surrounding format.

sections.label: ✨ Improve
items:
Flag songs that use the unusual paragraph format (

) with a ⚠️ warning symbol on both YEAR and DETAIL pages. Hovering the symbol shows a tooltip explaining the structural anomaly.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Parse setlists on old detail pages (e.g. 1974 gigs) where songs are listed as bare

elements rather than inside

    /
      . parseDetailSetlist now collects song links from

      children and emits them as a section alongside the existing OL/UL path.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Parse setlists on old detail pages where the <ol>/<ul> is nested inside a <div> within #page-content rather than being a direct child. parseDetailSetlist now widens its element search to td.querySelectorAll('ol, ul') when no lists appear as direct children of the container.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fall back to #page-content as the setlist container for very old detail pages (e.g. 1974 gigs) that have no #wiki-tab-0-1 tab widget. Previously these pages logged 'No setlist found' and skipped comparison entirely.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Skip

and

elements that are nested inside a when collecting YEAR page setlist elements. Release/news announcement boxes (e.g. the /retail:the-essential box after 2003#081103) use
containers and their all-caps headings were passing the prose filter and being treated as setlist songs.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Apply green match colour on DETAIL pages for plain-text <li> entries that have no /song: link (e.g. REFRIGERATOR BLUES). styleDetailLi now falls back to adding bb-song-match to the <li> itself when no song links are found, instead of silently doing nothing.

sections.label: 🔧 Refactor
items: Add detailed console logging in runDetailPage: matched event link text and href, next anchor name, number of collected setlist elements, year and detail song arrays, and per-item diff results.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fix 'No matching event link found' on all DETAIL pages. The path variable strips the leading slash (location.pathname.replace(/^\//, '')), so the href match '/' + path is required to compare against YEAR page anchors whose href attributes start with '/'.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Fix DETAIL page setlist comparison failing when the YEAR page anchor carries a letter suffix (e.g. '150571a') that is absent from the DETAIL page URL. Previously runDetailPage derived the anchor from the URL, which could not reproduce the suffix, causing the anchor lookup to fail and the comparison to be silently skipped. Fix: locate the event link on the YEAR page by matching its href against the current page path directly, then read the next <a name> boundary from that link — eliminating any dependence on the anchor name.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Support DETAIL pages whose setlist is placed directly inside #wiki-tab-0-1 with no wrapping <table>/<td> (e.g. early-era gig pages). Add getSetlistContainer() helper that falls back from '#wiki-tab-0-1 td' to '#wiki-tab-0-1' itself; use it in parseDetailSetlist, renderDetailSetlist, insertDetailToggle, and the runDetailPage snapshot.

Preserve letter suffixes (a, b, …) in YEAR-page anchor names derived from DETAIL page URLs. URLs like 'gig:1968-05-00a-…' now produce anchor '000568a' instead of '000568', correctly identifying multi-event days with unknown or zero day numbers.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Extend DETAIL-page name normalisation to handle the French article '(Le)' in addition to '(The)'. A DETAIL name like '1967-12-27 Teendezvous (Le), New Shrewsbury, NJ' is now rewritten to '1967-12-27 - LE TEENDEZVOUS, NEW SHREWSBURY, NJ' and correctly matches the YEAR page entry.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Preserve original label case on YEAR pages. Previously the label prefix (e.g. 'With Garland Jeffreys:') was stored as all-lowercase and then only the first character was re-capitalised on render, producing 'With garland jeffreys:'. Fix: store the raw label text as-is and use case-insensitive comparisons for the 'show'/'recording'/'soundcheck' special cases.

Ignore footnote nodes (e.g. 'Setlist incomplete and may be inaccurate.') when parsing YEAR page setlists. Previously el.textContent included the footnote text, causing its lowercase letters to trigger the prose-rejection filter and silently drop the setlist entry. Fix: a new textWithoutSup() helper strips children before extracting text for both the prose filter and song-name parsing. The footnote HTML is re-appended after
when renderSetlistElement rewrites the element, so it remains visible in the processed view.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: On DETAIL pages, apply the match colour only to song <a> links (by adding bb-song-match directly to each a[href^='/song:'] inside the <li>), not to the <li> element itself. Previously, adding bb-song-match to the <li> caused the general .bb-song-match { color: #2a2 } CSS rule to make the entire list item green, including descriptive <span> nodes such as '(parts)'.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Strip generic lowercase descriptive parentheticals — such as '(parts)', '(acoustic)', '(instrumental)' — from song names before comparison, so YEAR page entries like 'LONESOME DAY (parts)' correctly match DETAIL page entries 'LONESOME DAY'. Previously only '(with …)' and '(xN)' were stripped; the same single regex now covers all parentheticals that contain at least one lowercase letter, preserving all-caps song-name qualifiers like '(41 SHOTS)' and '(COME OUT TONIGHT)'.
On YEAR pages, render only the core song name inside the green bb-song-match span; any trailing qualifier such as '(parts)' is appended as plain uncoloured text outside the span.

On DETAIL pages, apply match colour only to the <a> link inside a matched <li> (li.bb-song-match a), not to the entire <li>. This prevents descriptive <span> nodes such as '(parts)' from inheriting the green colour.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Recognise hyphenated and lowercase label prefixes on YEAR page setlist entries (e.g. 'Pre-show: SONG', 'with Willie Nile: SONG'). The previous label-strip regex /^[A-Z][a-z]+\w*:/ required a single PascalCase word and failed on hyphens or lowercase-starting labels, causing those entries to be discarded as prose. Changed to /^[^/:\n]+:/ (anything up to the first colon) in both collectSetlistElements and parseYearSetlist.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Reject prose

elements that embed quoted lyrics with '/' as line-breaks (e.g. show-notes paragraphs). Previously any

containing ' / ' was accepted as a setlist. Fix: examine only the text before the first ' / ' (the first would-be song name), strip label prefix and qualifiers, and reject if lowercase letters remain. Genuine setlist entries always start with an all-caps song name; prose sentences have lowercase before the first slash.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Recognise single-song setlist entries on YEAR pages. The previous ' / ' separator check incorrectly treated all-caps single-song

elements (e.g. 'DANCING IN THE DARK') as prose. Replacement heuristic: strip any 'Label:' prefix and '(with …)'/'(xN)' qualifiers, then accept the

if no lowercase letters remain — prose always contains lowercase, brucebase song names are all-caps.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Skip

elements nested inside a

in collectSetlistElements. querySelectorAll('p, blockquote') returns both the
and its inner

; when the

contains a ' / ' separator it passed the prose filter and was counted twice, doubling every recording-session song in yearFlat and producing spurious year-only mismatches.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Stop collecting setlist elements when an inline event date header (

starting with YYYY-MM-DD - ) is encountered. Previously, events without their own named anchor (e.g. recording sessions listed inline on the year page) caused collectSetlistElements to sweep up setlists from dozens of subsequent unrelated events.

Fall back to plain <li> text when parsing detail-page setlists for songs that have no dedicated /song: page link. Previously such songs (e.g. REFRIGERATOR BLUES) were silently dropped, causing an empty detailSections result, an early return, and a missing toggle button. Venue/date entries (YYYY-MM-DD prefix) are excluded from the fallback.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add toggle button on DETAIL pages (after #page-title) to switch the active setlist tab between the original unprocessed content and the userscript-processed diff view. Uses show/hide on wrapper divs inside the setlist td rather than replacing #page-content, so wikidot tab-switching and all tooltip event listeners remain functional.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add setlist/recording session comparison between YEAR and DETAIL pages using LCS diff with Levenshtein char-diff reclassification for near-misses.

Parse YEAR page inline setlists (

/

) per-event using anchor boundaries.

Parse DETAIL page setlists from #wiki-tab-0-1
    /
      with section labels from

      headers.
Colour-code setlist diffs: green (match), light-blue (year-only), yellow (detail-only), red (char-diff).
Rich hover tooltips on non-matching songs via showSongTooltip.
DETAIL page mode: style existing <li>s and insert missing year-only songs inline.
Extend @include to match DETAIL pages (gig/nogig/recording/interview/offstage/onstage/rehearsal/soundcheck).
Add page-level global toggle button (after #page-title) to switch entire #page-content between original and processed view.
Add per-section toggle buttons (after each <hr>) to flip individual year-page sections between original and processed state.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Ignore prose description

s when collecting setlist elements — only

elements containing the ' / ' song-list delimiter qualify;

containers are always included.
Fix global toggle blank screen: use explicit 'block'/'none' values instead of clearing inline style, which left the CSS hide rule in effect.

Fix per-section toggle no visual effect: serialise original HTML as a plain string in wrapYearSections and only create the originalDiv node inside insertSectionToggle (after processing), preventing extractYearPageEvents from finding cloned <a> links and producing duplicate diffs.

sections.label: 🔧 Refactor
items: Rename script from brucebase-eventcheck.user.js to BruceBaseParser.user.js and reorganise repository layout.
Add new CSS classes: .bb-song-{match,year-only,detail-only,char-diff}, .bb-char-{match,diff}, .bb-sep, .bb-section-label, .bb-toggle-btn.

sections.label: 📝 Docs
items: Rewrite CLAUDE.md with full v1.3/v1.4 architecture documentation covering all three page modes, processing pipeline, LCS diff algorithm, colour-coding scheme, anchor format, name normalisation rules, and shared utility functions.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add support for YYYY-list pages: fetch the corresponding YEAR page once, build an anchor→name map, and compare each list event name (after stripping optional subtitle suffix) against the YEAR page entry.
Collect sibling text nodes after the <a> tag so suffixes like '(Golden Globe Awards)' are included in raw name capture.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Tooltip box now auto-sizes to content with no line-wrapping.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Initial release of BruceBase event name checker userscript.
Validates event name consistency between YEAR overview pages and their DETAIL pages.
Flags matches (✅), mismatches (❌), unknown event types (❓), and fetch failures (⚠️) with inline glyphs and rich diff tooltips.
Supports all known event types: gig, interview, nogig, offstage, onstage, recording, rehearsal, soundcheck.
Name normalisation: moves '(The)' suffix before comma to front, inserts ' - ' after date, uppercases for comparison.
Token-level diff displayed in hover tooltips via buildDiffHtml.
